name: ghidra-retro-mcp
description: A secure, headless Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for automated retro-reversing and bare-metal firmware analysis. Features in-process P-code micro-emulation and multi-generation console ROM auto-triage via PyGhidra.
author: getanirao

environmentVariables.name: GHIDRA_INSTALL_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Ghidra installation directory

environmentVariables.name: MOCK_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for zero-dependency CI simulation
